title: write_aiger drops output
body:
I found a `write_aiger` bug. On the following input

```
module bug (input i, output o);
  assign o = 1; 
endmodule
```
using the script
```
read_verilog <file.v>
synth
write_aiger -ascii -symbols <file.aag>
```
produces
```
aag 1 1 0 0 0
2
i0 i
c
Generated by Yosys 0.7+200 (git sha1 155a80df, gcc 6.3.0 -march=skylake -O2 -fPIC -Os)
```
Henc, the output gets dropped by the `write_aiger` command.
code_blocks:
aag 1 1 0 0 0
2
i0 i
c
Generated by Yosys 0.7+200 (git sha1 155a80df, gcc 6.3.0 -march=skylake -O2 -fPIC -Os)
